title: acronia forceps-cancri
intro: Acronia forceps-cancri is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, commonly known as the Acronia or the Forceps Acronia. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its leaves, which contain alkaloids with anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Acronia forceps-cancri include the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, as well as its potential use as an anti-diarrheal agent. Herbal preparations of Acronia forceps-cancri can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in traditional medicine in various parts of the world.
